TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wu_Bai, title = Wu_Bai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wu_Bai} }

S.FORM: Wu Bai Wu Bai u siwkay niza šľćšĹį(1968.1.14) ,tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Cyayi sian Liukuy siang. u Taywan palaway, mudadiway, misulit ku dadiway, misanga' tu dadiway. u yawkun dadiw putiputay a mudadiway atu mikitaay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam :GŇćo-pah) "šľćšĹį & China Blue"ÁöĄšłĽŚĒĪŚŹäšłĽťü≥ŚźČšĽĖśČč. u sulit nu Amilika Wu Chun-lin (Chinese: Śź≥šŅäťúĖ; pinyin: W√ļ J√Ļnl√≠n; born 14 January 1968), better known by his stage name Wu Bai (Chinese: šľćšĹį; pinyin: W«Ē B«éi; PeŐćh-Ňće-jńę: GŇćÕė-pah), is a Taiwanese rock singer and songwriter. He formed the band Wu Bai & China Blue with Dean Zavolta , Yu Ta-hao and Chu Chien-hui , while Wu himself is the lead guitarist and vocalist of the band. Dubbed "The King of Live Music", Wu is considered to be one of the biggest pop music stars in East and Southeast Asia. u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: wu bai wu bai u siwkaj niza **(****.*.**) ,tatama, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i tajwan ¶jaji sian r~…ĺiukuj siaŇč. u tajwan par~…ĺawaj, mudadiwaj, misur~…ĺit ku dadiwaj, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu dadiwaj. u jawkun dadiw putiputaj a mudadiwaj atu mikitaaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam :g*o-pańß) "** & ¶ńßina br~…ĺu…ô"*********. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika wu ¶ńßun-r~…ĺin ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: w* **nr~…ĺ*n; born ** *anuarj ****), b…ôtt…ôr known bj ńßis stag…ô nam…ô wu bai ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: **; pinjin: w* b*i; p…ô*ńß-*…ô-j*: g**-pańß), is a taiwan…ôs…ô ro ¶k siŇč…ôr and soŇčwrit…ôr. ńß…ô form…ôd tńß…ô band wu bai & ¶ńßina br~…ĺu…ô witńß d…ôan za*or~…ĺta , ju ta-ńßao and ¶ńßu ¶ńßi…ôn-ńßui , wńßir~…ĺ…ô wu ńßims…ôr~…ĺf is tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôad guitarist and *o ¶ar~…ĺist of tńß…ô band. dubb…ôd "tńß…ô kiŇč of r~…ĺi*…ô musi ¶", wu is ¶onsid…ôr…ôd to b…ô on…ô of tńß…ô bigg…ôst pop musi ¶ stars in …ôast and soutńß…ôast asia. u kawr~…ĺańß niza u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: Wu Bai Wu Bai u siwkay niza šľćšĹį(1968.1.14) ,tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Cyayi sian Liukuy siang. u Taywan palaway, mudadiway, misulit ku dadiway, misanga' tu dadiway. u yawkun dadiw putiputay a mudadiway atu mikitaay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam :GŇćo-pah) "šľćšĹį & China Blue"ÁöĄšłĽŚĒĪŚŹäšłĽťü≥ŚźČšĽĖśČč. u sulit nu Amilika Wu Chun-lin (Chinese: Śź≥šŅäťúĖ; pinyin: W√ļ J√Ļnl√≠n; born 14 January 1968), better known by his stage name Wu Bai (Chinese: šľćšĹį; pinyin: W«Ē B«éi; PeŐćh-Ňće-jńę: GŇćÕė-pah), is a Taiwanese rock singer and songwriter. He formed the band Wu Bai & China Blue with Dean Zavolta , Yu Ta-hao and Chu Chien-hui , while Wu himself is the lead guitarist and vocalist of the band. Dubbed "The King of Live Music", Wu is considered to be one of the biggest pop music stars in East and Southeast Asia. u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
